hero.title: Cultivating the Digital Future.
hero.description: NEWCOMP provides high-performance IT infrastructure and bespoke software solutions designed to scale with your ambitions.

about.title: About Me
about.description: As a passionate System Engineer and Cloud Workplace Developer, my expertise lies in modern infrastructure and automation using Terraform. When I'm not designing complex cloud environments or diving deep into the world of Artificial Intelligence and OpenClaw, I enjoy my time as a proud father. To me, technology is more than just a tool; it's a way to shape a smarter and more efficient future.

coltivo.title: Coltivo.de
coltivo.description: A specialized container management platform for textiles and waste. Optimizing collection logistics and lifecycle tracking for sustainable urban environments.

nexus.title: Nexus Grid
nexus.description: High-availability network infrastructure for modern enterprises. Zero-latency connectivity powered by NEWCOMP's proprietary hardware.

openclaw.title: AI (OpenClaw) Automatisation
openclaw.description: Next-generation autonomous systems for industrial and digital workflows. Redefining efficiency through intelligent process automation.

services.title: IT Services
services.description: From automated cloud infrastructures with Terraform to intelligent AI-driven workflows, we build the foundation for your digital edge.

cloudInfrastructure.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloudInfrastructure.description: Automated, scalable, and secure environments powered by Terraform and modern cloud stacks.

aiAutomation.title: AI & Automation
aiAutomation.description: Integrating cutting-edge AI solutions and OpenClaw to streamline your business processes.
